説明文: When it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks.
入手方法: イベント: Bonus Pick - Lightning-Type Pokemon Mass Outbreak Event

ワザ.効果: This attack also does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon.
